title: Rails views
description: A single ActionView rendering event. This schema covers three event_types that share the same field shape: render_template.action_view (top-level template), render_partial.action_view (render partial: call), and render_collection.action_view (render collection: call). Each event corresponds to one render call; a single request typically emits one render_template and several render_partials.

view.description: Path of the template file, e.g. "[PROJECT_ROOT]/app/views/users/show.html.erb". Group by view::str to bucket per-template.

layout.description: Layout the template was rendered into, e.g. "application". Null when the render skipped layouts.

request_id.description: Rails request UUID, present on all events fired during a request. Ties this event to sibling process_action.action_controller and sql.active_record events from the same request.

instrumenter_id.description: ActiveSupport::Notifications instrumenter UUID, added by the Honeybadger notification subscriber.
